case_title: LOUCEL, CARLOS M. VS GUZMAN, MIGUEL MORA DBA MC BODY SHOP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,682.46 FILED BY LOUCEL, CARLOS M. AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, MIGUEL MORA DBA MC BODY SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MIGUEL MORA RETURNED SIGNED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, MIGUEL MORA DBA MC BODY SHOP NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-15-1993, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-15-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-17-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUCEL, CARLOS M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUZMAN, MIGUEL MORA DBA MC BODY SHOP $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GUZMAN, MIGUEL MORA DBA MC BODY SHOP HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-21-1993, GRANTED
